title: New Hydrogen Power Projects to Boost Growth
content: Twenty-seven hydrogen projects have been selected for the next stage of the Second Hydrogen Allocation Round (HAR2) â€“ supporting low-carbon hydrogen production in the UK. The industry has the potential to attract over Â£1 billion of private sector investment into the UK by 2029, supporting the governmentâ€™s mission to become a clean energy superpower. Hydrogen will help deliver a new era of clean energy across the UK and decarbonise emission-intensive industries. It has already attracted Â£400 million of private sector investment in towns and cities such as Milford Haven in Wales and High Marnham in Nottinghamshire, and is creating over 700 direct jobs in construction and operations.
author: Analysts Account
